name: Panache: One-Pass Motif Discovery at Every Window Length
summary: arXiv:2607.17481v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Motif discovery, the search for recurring patterns within a time series, is a core primitive of exploratory data analysis. A pattern, however, is def...
description: arXiv:2607.17481v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Motif discovery, the search for recurring patterns within a time series, is a core primitive of exploratory data analysis. A pattern, however, is defined by its duration, which analysts rarely know in advance. To resolve this unknown duration, an interval of window lengths is defined, and the accepted method is to try every length in that interval...
author: Tej Sanibh Ranade
